Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications pre-populated with each order's specific status, estimated arrival, or dead-end notification.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Saves hours of manual email writing across the team each week and ensures customers receive consistent, accurate updates without staff needing to research each order individually.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes fitment and part data from Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to build a comprehensive make, model, and year reference for two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Eliminates hours of manual competitor catalog browsing and ensures Dino has a complete, current market picture without relying on outdated PDFs or manual lookups.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify overlaps and coverage gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC competes, where it's missing, and where new product opportunities exist — without manual side-by-side comparison.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking them to indicate demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from the market passively, enabling DFC to prioritize product development based on actual customer need rather than internal assumptions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and collected customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, decision-ready reference document that consolidates competitor coverage, DFC gaps, and customer demand — accelerating the product roadmap process.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad campaigns to extract the full copy text from every live ad, including headlines, body text, and call-to-action fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility across every running ad in seconds, making it possible to audit the entire active ad library on demand rather than reviewing ads one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Reads through all extracted ad copy and flags every instance where a specified phrase or term appears, recording the exact ad, field, and matching text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Eliminates manual text scanning across potentially hundreds of ads and ensures no match is missed, giving the team a precise and reliable compliance or quality check.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured report listing every flagged ad with the specific field and exact copy where each matched phrase was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a clean, actionable findings list directly in the right person's inbox, enabling fast review and immediate corrective action on any problematic ad copy.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline continues to grow strong, now tracking **53 total agents** — **24 Completed, 9 In Progress, and 20 Planned**. This week we welcomed two new additions: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen agent sourcing prospective tenants for the 13140 Midway Place space, and the **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will analyze and optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both R1 and DFC brands. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** officially moved to Completed this week — great work to everyone involved in getting that across the finish line. The pipeline is firing on all cylinders, and momentum continues to build heading into next week!
